claim_text: We used two DFDs based on natural images, LPIPS and the Deep Image Structure and Texture Similarity index (DISTS),28 which have been used as benchmark IQ metrics in large-scale computer vision IQ metric studies.34 LPIPS uses an L2-norm for G, VGG-1646 trained on ImageNet for 𝜙D , and additionally learns a linear combination of DFDs extracted from five different convolutional layers l based on perceptual judgment scores.
